Name: Porsche
tip1: Ferdinand Porsche was received into the International Motorsports Hall of Fame in 1996 and won the Car Engineer of the Century award in 1999.
2Q: What dominating racing Porsche Steve McQueen drove in a cult LeMans movie?
tip2: In 2017 the car driven by McQueen in the film was sold at auction for $14 million.
3Q: Which is the first large-scale Porsche model, sold in more than 75,000 units?
tip3: Over time a variety styles of 356 appeared, including coupé, roadster, convertible, cabriolet, and a very rare split-roof.
tip4: Peugeot legally protected all three-digit names with zero in the middle, so Porsche changed the 901 to 911.
5Q: What is the nickname for the Porsche 930 Turbo?
tip5: It was given the nickname Widowmaker because it is a highly demanding car to drive.
6Q: Which is the last air-cooled 911 model?
tip6: The 993 was the first 911 to receive a six-speed transmission.
7Q: Which engine drives Porsche Carrera GT?
tip7: The V10 was a unit secretly built by Porsche for the Footwork Formula One team in 1992 but later shelved.
8Q: What is the name of the first Porsche's SUV?
tip8: Despite being an SUV, the Cayenne for many years was Porsche's best-selling model.
9Q: Which is the most brutal road-legal version of the 911 model?
tip9: GT2 RS is the most expensive and fastest model among the 911 lineup.
10Q: Which is the starting price of a new electric Porsche Taycan Turbo?
tip10: Taycan is Porsche's first series production electric car.
